# growthbook_dashboard (Resource)

A GrowthBook dashboard. Dashboards are composed of blocks and can be tied to an experiment or stand alone as a general dashboard.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `edit_level` (String) Edit level: `published` or `private`.
- `enable_auto_updates` (Boolean) Whether automatic updates are enabled (general dashboards require an update_schedule).
- `share_level` (String) Share level: `published` or `private`.
- `title` (String) Display name of the dashboard.

### Optional

- `blocks` (Attributes List) Ordered list of dashboard blocks. Currently only `markdown` blocks are fully supported by this provider; other block types require type-specific fields that the API rejects when absent. Leave empty for a blank dashboard. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--blocks))
- `experiment_id` (String) Parent experiment ID for an experiment dashboard. Omit for a general dashboard. Immutable; changing it forces a new dashboard.
- `projects` (List of String) Project IDs (general dashboards only).
- `update_schedule` (Attributes) Automatic refresh schedule for general dashboards. Write-only: not refreshed from the server. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--update_schedule))

### Read-Only

- `date_created` (String) Creation timestamp (RFC3339).
- `date_updated` (String) Last update timestamp (RFC3339).
- `id` (String) Unique dashboard identifier.
- `is_default` (Boolean) Whether this is the default dashboard.
- `organization` (String) Owning organization ID.
- `uid` (String) Public dashboard UID.
- `user_id` (String) ID of the user who created the dashboard.

<a id="nestedatt--blocks"></a>
### Nested Schema for `blocks`

Required:

- `title` (String) Block title.
- `type` (String) Block type. Use `markdown` (the only block type with full provider support); other GrowthBook block types require type-specific fields not modeled here.

Optional:

- `content` (String) Markdown content (required for `markdown` blocks).
- `description` (String) Block description.
- `experiment_id` (String) Experiment ID (experiment-related blocks).
- `layout` (Attributes) Position of the block on the grid. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--blocks--layout))
- `metric_ids` (List of String) Metric IDs (metric blocks).
- `snapshot_id` (String) Associated snapshot ID.
- `variation_ids` (List of String) Variation IDs (experiment blocks).

<a id="nestedatt--blocks--layout"></a>
### Nested Schema for `blocks.layout`

Required:

- `h` (Number) Height in rows.
- `w` (Number) Width in columns (1-24).
- `x` (Number) Column position (0-23).
- `y` (Number) Row position.

Optional:

- `static` (Boolean) Whether the block is fixed in place.



<a id="nestedatt--update_schedule"></a>
### Nested Schema for `update_schedule`

Required:

- `type` (String) Schedule type: `stale` or `cron`.

Optional:

- `cron` (String) Cron expression (for `cron`).
- `hours` (Number) Staleness threshold in hours (for `stale`).
